item.title: Pointers in C: solved pass-by-reference exercises
item.description: Solved pointers exercise in C to master pass-by-reference, variable swap, and common pointer mistakes.

item.title: Pointer to pointer in C: solved exercise with reference update
item.description: Solved pointer-to-pointer exercise in C to safely update addresses from inside a function.

item.title: Malloc and free in C: solved dynamic memory exercise
item.description: Solved dynamic memory exercise in C with malloc checks, realloc resizing, and safe free cleanup.

item.title: malloc and realloc in C: solved dynamic array exercise
item.description: Solved malloc and realloc exercise in C to build a growing dynamic integer array.

item.title: calloc in C: solved exercise with zero-initialized dynamic array
item.description: Solved calloc exercise in C: differences from malloc, zero initialization, and when to use each dynamic memory allocation function.

item.title: Function pointers in C: solved exercise with callbacks
item.description: Solved function pointer exercise in C: declaration, assignment, direct call, array of function pointers, and callback with qsort.

item.title: Double free in C: solved exercise to avoid memory corruption
item.description: Solved double-free exercise in C with safe release-and-null pattern.

item.title: Memory leak in C: solved exercise and fix
item.description: Solved exercise to detect and fix memory leaks in C.

item.title: safe realloc in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved realloc exercise in C using a temporary pointer to avoid memory loss.

item.title: Pointer arithmetic in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved pointer-arithmetic exercise in C to traverse arrays without explicit indices.
